title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally with a simple API and model library.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, wrapping its REST API with idiomatic Python helpers.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node.js and browsers, providing typed wrappers around the Ollama API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration layer that lets you plug any Ollama-hosted model into LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface) with multi-model chat, file uploads, and admin controls.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Flutter desktop GUI for chatting with Ollama models on Windows, macOS, and Linux.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with synchronous, asynchronous, and reactive (RxJava) APIs.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama, offering a fluent interface and ActiveModel-style integrations.

title: OllamaSharp
summary: .NET library that wraps the Ollama REST API with async enumerable streaming and dependency-injection support.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive terminal UI (TUI) for Ollama written in Go, featuring chat history and fuzzy model search.

title: ollama-hass
summary: Home Assistant custom component exposing Ollama models as conversation agents for voice/text automations.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-style VS Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline code suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Minimal multi-arch Docker image for Ollama with CUDA and ROCm variants; useful for CI and edge deployments.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Next.js chat app that stores Ollama conversations in Supabase and supports shared links.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Retrieval-augmented-generation template combining Ollama embeddings, Chroma vector DB, and LangChain.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that streams Ollama model responses into any channel with slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command for chatting with local models in Slack threads.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets you run Ollama models on selected notes for summarization or Q&A.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim client for Ollama with compile-time API validation and async/await support.
